Sometimes in business you gotta care for people's savings. I gotta talk to my business partner. When you hear that, this is what you want to say. You know, Jerry, that's incredible value you just gave to me. I gotta go talk to my business partner about that though. Okay, great! Listen, let's actually do this. You got this phone number, right? Let's go ahead and give a call. We can hop on a three-way phone call. I can present the same value that I just did now since I'm here and I'm in front of you as well. We can come to a clear consensus that both parties are on the same page as far as your guys' business partner relationship. We can get this thing signed up. What's his number? I can also call him on mine. Now, some people will be like, I don't think that's gonna be available right now. We're probably not gonna be able to do that. Oh, perfect! Well, what time are we gonna be able to do that tomorrow? It's the morning or afternoon better for you guys. And they're like, I mean, I don't know, tomorrow's good. Perfect! Tell me this. What day of the week is best to follow up? And if they say, we'll let you know, that's not gonna be a sale. Sorry. You're gonna have to follow up that individual after that because you couldn't get the follow-up appointment schedule. Now, let's go back to the top of that. I got to talk to my business partner. Okay, great! Let's get them on the call. And they say, hmm, okay. And you do get them on the phone? Present the same value that you just did to the presentation of the other business partner. We do it in a summary way. See, the other business partner that they're calling for you to have presented the value you did to who you did, that's the decision-maker. This other person is just a consensus partner, meaning they commonly will have a conversation internally to one another to see if it is an actual value to both of them in the relationship they have together. Commonly, a business partner to business partner relationship is something that they're using to cover the weaknesses and strengths of the other party. So if you're presenting to somebody, they might be the decision-maker or the executor, but they might not be good at making the right financial decisions. Therefore, the person that you're gonna get on the phone might care more about the hard numbers or might be of a planner, is what I've commonly found. So break down your summary into the steps of action and clearly articulate the result that those steps of actions get and say the cost of what it takes to accomplish those actions. Also imply that you are literally about to sign an agreement to start taking actions starting whenever, right now. And you are calling for the consensus of that business partner in order to move forward on the agreement, and is it okay for partner X to sign the agreement? You stage the question, you get the answer. The quality of questions, you ask dictates the quality of the life you live. If you are not, however, as graceful and as finesse-oriented as I may be in order to get on the phone with a business partner in real time with the other business partner who just told you they have to talk to their other business partner, you need to schedule an appointment with both of them. You either need to do it for a phone conversation or do it in person, in person preferred, and you need to understand the dynamic of their relationship at that point because you now have a situation where you have more than one decision-maker in the party. You need to understand that the business partner they brought in, what the strengths of that person is, versus what the weaknesses they are covering of the individual that you spoke to and that you presented with. Also be sure to ask after somebody says, why do I need to go talk to my business partner? Try to understand the dynamic right here. Let's get into it again. You know, I got to go talk to my business partner real quick, Jeremy. I need his help in order to make the decision. That's great. Let me ask you a question. What weaknesses does your business partner cover that enables you or disables you to make a decision on this agreement right now? Did you hear that, Hita? That person, male or female, is going to be so thrown up and twisted by what you just said. Their ego will become a flame and they will immediately defend themselves to the grave, I bet. This person, when you say something like that, let's run that back. Hey, Jeremy, I need to go talk to my business partner. Well, that's great that you need to go talk to your business partner. Let me ask you a question. What weaknesses does your business partner cover for you that would disable you or enable you to make a decision on this agreement to move forward together right now? Whoa. The weaknesses that they cover. I'm fully competent to make the decision, Jeremy. I wanted to talk to my business partner because we're in business together. I can make the decision. Great, great. Calm down. Calm down. I didn't mean to upset you there. I just was simply curious as what I found, like, for example, when Apple or any other dynamic like Airbnb even, there's co-founders and the co-founders rely on one another for the strengths and the weaknesses of what the other people's weaknesses are comparatively to the strengths that the other executives and business people offer. I was simply wondering if your business partner was, for example, the finance guy or the money guy or somebody that would affect your ability to make the decision today because I felt like you comprehended the amount of value that was in this and as an executive, you, especially if you have a business partner, would make this decision and then take it to them in order to show them how competent of a person you are in the relationship. As a matter of fact, I felt that there was so much value in what we were going to do together today that this was going to be something you'd also take home to your family and your wife and show off because of how much impact something like this would have on your business for the cost of what it is. It's almost like you bought a super car for a fourth of a cost. I thought it'd be that kind of emotion that I'd generate inside of you. Maybe I misinterpreted that. Anyway, do you think you'd be able to make the decision today? If so, can we sign the agreement? Get the person's ego is provoked a little bit. I'll see you guys in the next video.
